tags.description: 100m tunnel through cliff face with air pocket at end
tags.name: Billinghurst Cave
tags.validation_notes: Largest cave on Gozo ~100-130m long. Air pocket inside but gas quality unverified. Technical chimney exits at 57m.

tags.description: 115m oil tanker wreck (115m x 15.5m) sitting upright on sandy bottom. Funnel at 15m, propeller at 36m. Penetrable with strong currents possible.
tags.name: Um El Faroud

tags.description: Dramatic wall drop-off. Reef drops to 17-25m to the west, 60m+ to the east. Deep chimney 'Reqqa bottle' at 58m.
tags.name: Reqqa Point

tags.description: British Tribal-class destroyer (WW2). Bow at 14m on white sand. Good training wreck for beginners; penetration not recommended due to structural instability. Abundant marine life.
tags.name: HMS Maori
MT Hephaestus
tags.note: Oil tanker (595 GRT) built 1965, scuttled 29 Aug 2022. Rests upright. Deck at approximately 40m; max depth ~47m.

tags.name: Bottleneck Cave (Dive Site)
tags.validation_notes: Technical/cave dive only: entrance at 37m, bottom 58m. Not recreational.

tags.description: Beach and coastline with salt pans and caves. Popular for snorkelling and diving.
tags.name: Ħondoq ir-Rummien
Jesus of Qawra
tags.validation_notes: Statue relocated from St Pauls Island to Qawra Point 17 May 2000. Anchor nearby 17th c. ~30m from MV Imperial Eagle.

tags.name: Madonna
tags.validation_notes: Statue placed Nov 1987 by Amphibians Diving Club. Located in Susie's Pool area of Cirkewwa, not the main reef wall.

tags.name: Captain Morgan Small World
tags.validation_notes: UNRESOLVED: Only 2 independent sources found. Vessel scuttling date, dimensions, and precise location unconfirmed. Insufficient sources for full validation.

tags.name: Whale Cave
tags.validation_notes: Open crack cave (not true overhead): surface accessible throughout. Also known as Ghar in-Niexef / Audrey's Crack.

tags.name: Filfla
tags.validation_notes: Permit required from Malta Ministry of Environment. UXO on seabed from RAF/RN target practice pre-1971 — do not touch anything.

tags.name: HMS Urge
tags.validation_notes: War grave at 130m. NOT a recreational dive. No regular public dive access. Expedition-only.

tags.name: Xemxija Bay
tags.validation_notes: Not listed in any Malta dive operator database. May be geographic scrape, not a formal named dive site.

tags.name: San Georges Bay
tags.validation_notes: Not listed in any Malta dive operator database. May be geographic scrape, not a formal named dive site.
